treatment_information.treatment_response: Loading dose administered, no evidence of seizures on EEG monitoring
Administered for upper gastrointestinal bleeding management
Hematocrit dropped after IV fluids but stabilized

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Intubated upon arrival, extubated after stabilization
treatment_information.treatment_response: Successfully extubated and stable pulmonary function

treatment_timeline.event: Patient intubated due to respiratory compromise

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental status improved, fully alert and interactive by discharge
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Plans to follow-up with primary care physician and neurologist
patient_outcome.complications: Significant delirium post-extubation but eventually resolved
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to follow up for monitoring of alcohol use and mental status
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Mentally improved over the course of hospitalization
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was alert and independent at discharge but remained confused at times
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported feeling groggy but oriented during assessment
